**Daily totals:** 3,517 cal | 128g protein | 400g carbs | 179g fat | 38g fiber

**Reality check:** You're solidly over target on calories (~1,100 cal surplus) and carbs are high. But protein is excellent at 128g. Tonight's swim at easy pace is the right call—don't push hard, just move water and recover.

**Before you hit the pool:** Hydrate well, eat light if you're hungry (doesn't sound like it), and keep it technical. See you poolside.
Thw two servings of hummus should be 160 calories. I also had 200g nonfat greek yogurt, 4 oz cheddar cheese, and two whole wheat tortillas from trader joes

✅ **Swim logged: 350m in 7:47 @ 124 avg BPM**

---

**On the breathing:** You're spot-on—that's *the* thing holding you back. Good news: you're **aware of it and improving with reps**. Breathing rhythm takes time. Don't chase speed yet; nail the breath pattern first, then speed follows.

**Your splits:**
- 150m (3:31) — warm-up pace
- 50m (0:56) — solid
- 50m (1:00) — steady
- 100m (2:20) — controlled

**What's here:** Easy, technical work. HR at 124 is low-effort. You're building the engine correctly—technique first, not grinding.

---

**On the food:** Yeah, you swung hard on the junk instead of structured lunch. That happens. **But look:**
- **Protein: 128g** ✓ solid for the day
- **Calories: 3,517** — roughly +1,100 over target

**Moving forward:** Tomorrow, front-load with real food (eggs, chicken, fish) at lunch. The junk fills bellies fast but leaves you still hungry. Structured meals = better satiety + better workouts.

**Tonight:** You're done. Recovery mode. 3 min meditation, no TV after 8pm, read or journal. Sleep well.

I just ate too much junkfood instead of lunch today.

**Total: 800m | 16:48 | Easy pace | Breathing focus**

---

**On the breathing:** You nailed it—**awareness + reps = improvement**. That last 150m (3:09) is *faster* than your first (3:31), and you're holding it easy. Rhythm is clicking. Keep this work up; breathing will unlock speed naturally.

**On the food:** Yeah, junk beats hunger fast but leaves you empty. Tomorrow, structure lunch—protein + carbs at midday, not midnight snacking. You know the pattern now.

---

**Tonight:**
- ✓ Swim done
- 🧘 3 min meditation (before bed)
- 📺 No TV after 8pm
- 📚 Read 30 min or journal

**Pending:**
- 10 min yoga
- Post 1 Substack note
- Write 1 hour

**Rest well. Pool work was solid.**
